title: Table of contents post-market submission guidance - Canada.ca
content:
## Table of contents post-market submission guidance
Download in PDF format (504 KB, 8 pages)
Organization: Health Canada
- Heading Classifications and Content Examples
- Submission filing process

## Heading Classifications and Content Examples
Not all folders (headings) are required for every submission. While the Table of Contents (ToC) is used for these interactions, only select folders are required for post-market submissions, and content guidance is specific to this context. A sample folder structure is shown below:
- Licence name 1-REGADMIN 1.01-CoverLetter 1.03-ListofTerms-Acronyms 1.05-ListofDevices 1.10-Pre-SubmissionCorrespondence-PreviousRegulatorInteractions 2-CONTEXT 2.04-DeviceDescription 2.04.03-HistoryofDevelopment 2.06-GlobalMarketingHistory 2.06.01-GlobalMarketHistory 2.06.02-IncidentReports-Recalls 2.06.03-SalesIncident-RecallRates 2.11-OtherSubmissionContextInfo 4-CLINICAL 4.05-RWD 4.06-Post-MarketSurveillanceData 5-LABELLING 5.02-Product-PackageLabels 5.03-PackageInsert-InstructionsforUse 5.04-e-labelling 5.05-HealthcareProfessionalLabelling 5.06-PatientLabelling 5.07-Technical-OperatiorManual 5.08-PatientFileStickers-Cards-ImplantRegistrationCards 5.09-ProductBrochures 5.10-OtherLabelling-PromotionalMaterial
- 1-REGADMIN 1.01-CoverLetter 1.03-ListofTerms-Acronyms 1.05-ListofDevices 1.10-Pre-SubmissionCorrespondence-PreviousRegulatorInteractions
- 1.03-ListofTerms-Acronyms
- 1.10-Pre-SubmissionCorrespondence-PreviousRegulatorInteractions
- 2-CONTEXT 2.04-DeviceDescription 2.04.03-HistoryofDevelopment 2.06-GlobalMarketingHistory 2.06.01-GlobalMarketHistory 2.06.02-IncidentReports-Recalls 2.06.03-SalesIncident-RecallRates 2.11-OtherSubmissionContextInfo
- 2.04-DeviceDescription 2.04.03-HistoryofDevelopment
- 2.04.03-HistoryofDevelopment
- 2.06-GlobalMarketingHistory 2.06.01-GlobalMarketHistory 2.06.02-IncidentReports-Recalls 2.06.03-SalesIncident-RecallRates
- 2.06.01-GlobalMarketHistory
- 2.06.02-IncidentReports-Recalls
- 2.06.03-SalesIncident-RecallRates
- 2.11-OtherSubmissionContextInfo
- 4-CLINICAL 4.05-RWD 4.06-Post-MarketSurveillanceData
- 4.06-Post-MarketSurveillanceData
- 5-LABELLING 5.02-Product-PackageLabels 5.03-PackageInsert-InstructionsforUse 5.04-e-labelling 5.05-HealthcareProfessionalLabelling 5.06-PatientLabelling 5.07-Technical-OperatiorManual 5.08-PatientFileStickers-Cards-ImplantRegistrationCards 5.09-ProductBrochures 5.10-OtherLabelling-PromotionalMaterial
- 5.02-Product-PackageLabels
- 5.03-PackageInsert-InstructionsforUse
- 5.05-HealthcareProfessionalLabelling
- 5.06-PatientLabelling
- 5.07-Technical-OperatiorManual
- 5.08-PatientFileStickers-Cards-ImplantRegistrationCards
- 5.09-ProductBrochures
- 5.10-OtherLabelling-PromotionalMaterial
The table below outlines the classification, applicable conditions and examples of content for each heading.
- CR = Conditionally Required

### All Classes for IVD and non-IVD (I to IV) Post-Market Request and Additional Information Responses to Post-Market Requests
Cover letter or email response from manufacturer.
1.03-List of Terms/Acronyms
List of terms or acronyms that are used in the transaction
1.05-Listing of Device(s)
Required for Class I Include when applicable or requested for Class II, III, IV
List of devices including trade or product names, catalogue or reference numbers.
1.10-Pre-Submission Correspondence and Previous Regulator Interactions
Post-market request letter or email.
2.04-Device description
If applicable to request
2.04.03-History of Development
If applicable to request
Description of design changes and rationale for changes when requested/implemented.
2.06-Global Market History
If applicable to request
2.06.01-Global Market History
If applicable to request
Countries where device is licensed and date of licensing.
2.06.02-Incident Reports and Recalls
If applicable to request
Global and Canadian complaints, incident reports and summaries, root cause analysis, investigation update / report, corrective actions, recall information.
2.06.03-Sales, Incident and Recall Rates
If applicable to request
Global and Canadian incident rate (including rates in relation to sales), sales data.
2.11-Other Submission Context Information
When information is requested by the regulator (through guidance documents or other communication) but does not belong in any of the other headings of this chapter.
Health Canada requested information (post market) incident issue analysis (trending analysis). A summary of individual safety and effectiveness analyses, summary reports required under specific regulatory provisions, or evaluation documents that are not otherwise captured under designated headings. Post-market device safety issue-related analysis and benefit and/or risk analysis documents. Listing or description of previous risk mitigation measures implemented or planned to address the post-market issue. For more information see Guidance on summary reports and issue-related analyses for medical devices
- Health Canada requested information (post market) incident issue analysis (trending analysis).
- A summary of individual safety and effectiveness analyses, summary reports required under specific regulatory provisions, or evaluation documents that are not otherwise captured under designated headings.
- Post-market device safety issue-related analysis and benefit and/or risk analysis documents.
- Listing or description of previous risk mitigation measures implemented or planned to address the post-market issue.
For more information see Guidance on summary reports and issue-related analyses for medical devices
4.05-Real World Data
If applicable to request
Device registry, medical records data
4.06-Post-Market Surveillance Data
If applicable to request
5.02-Product/Package Labels
If applicable to request
Device package label
5.03-Package Insert/Instructions for Use
If applicable to request
Current instructions for use, package insert, directions for use.
If applicable to request
5.05-Healthcare Professional Labelling
If applicable to request
Physician labelling, Physician educational material.
5.06-Patient Labelling
If applicable to request
Patient brochure, patient consent form, patient educational material.
5.07-Technical/Operators Manual
If applicable to request
5.08-Patient File Stickers/Cards and Implant Registration Cards
If applicable to request
5.09-Product Brochures
If applicable to request
5.10-Other Labelling and Promotional Material
If applicable to request
Any other documents that come with the device
The following additional tool is available to aid in creating post-market submissions:

## Submission filing process
For filing process and transmission options, refer to the Health Canada IMDRF table of contents for medical device applications guidance page .
